name: cn-doc-writer
description: Use when creating, translating, reviewing, or improving Chinese technical documentation / 中文技术文档, including tutorials, README, API docs, 技术翻译, 去 AI 味, 开源项目解读, architecture analysis, benchmark 解读, learning goals, exercises, terminology consistency, and de-AI polishing of Chinese technical prose.
author: Sisyphus

commands.name: write-cn-doc
commands.description: 从零开始编写中文技术文档（自动路由：快速/标准/完整模式）

commands.name: translate-cn
commands.description: 将英文技术资料翻译成中文（保留代码、命令和术语边界）

commands.name: optimize-cn-doc
commands.description: 优化现有中文文档（诊断 → 改进 → 量化评估）

commands.name: enhance-learning
commands.description: 为文档添加学习元素（目标、练习、自测、进阶路径）
